"Yet beyond just being historical curiosities or nostalgic artifacts from yesteryears, these Van Cliburn recordings serve another larger purpose – they act almost like time capsules revealing how far music has come while simultaneously emphasizing on its inherent timelessness. From the virtuosic bravado of Richter performing Chopin Ballades to sensitive interpretations given by Britten's Serenade for Tenor Horns in C sharp minor performed here with warmth and nuance under andré Previn’ s baton, we see what once was possible within a singular artist/composer collaboration." "This selection also hints at how little has changed when it comes down to the core essentials of music appreciation – despite technological advancements or changes over time; there remains something fundamentally human about making and consuming art through our innate desire for beauty. texts.full_text: on to Ready Volley. Your friend is correct that Rangers can Ready Action Whirlwind, but that's because Whirlwind is a Reaction, not an Action. Here's the relevant rules from the Player's Handbook: Ready Action (PHB, page 195): "When you take a Ready action, you're preparing yourself to take an Action on a later turn when a trigger occurs. Here's how it works: 1. Choose the trigger. Choose the trigger that will cause you to take the Action. You can choose anything that happens within the turn, like a creature moving into a certain space, a creature moving within a certain distance, or a creature coming into view. You can also choose a trigger that happens during a certain initiative count, like "when initiative count 2 happens." 2. Specify the Action. You must choose the Action that you'll take when the trigger occurs. You can choose any Action you can take, even one that you can't normally take on your turn." Volley (PHB, page 92, under the Ranger class): "When you take the Attack action on your turn, you can choose to take the Attack action as a bonus action on your next turn."

texts.full_text: , type the command "regedit" and then confirm the operation by pressing "ENTER". This operation will start the system registry editor. This tool allows you to not only view the existing entries, but also to modify, add or delete them manually. Due to the fact that the Windows registry is essential to its operation, all operations performed on it should be done carefully and deliberately. Reckless removal or modification of the wrong key can permanently damage the operating system. Using the keyboard shortcut ctr + F or the Edit menu and by selecting "Find" look for the .ZP0 extension you are interested in by typing it in the search window. Confirm by clicking OK or by using the ENTER key. Backup copy. It is extremely important to make a backup copy of the registry before making any changes to it. Every change affects our PC. In extreme cases, incorrect registry modification may result in not being able to restart the system. The value you are interested in concerning the extension can be edited by making manual changes in the keys assigned to the .ZP0 extension found. Here you can also create your own entry with the .ZP0 extension if there is no such in the registry. All available options are listed in the context menu (right mouse button) or in the "Edit" menu after placing the cursor in the appropriate place on the screen. After

texts.full_text: Moments for Hands" program. 2）One critical aim was establishing an auditing mechanism that allows local and international benchmarking by monitoring compliance rates with their guidelines at different levels: unit, hospital state level as well national scale; categorized into moments (times to wash hands) based on the WHO recommendations. 3). Initially data collection for hand hygiene compliances were done manually using paper forms which then had be transferred digitally and sent out via email. 4）The OLBD was developed in July 2010, providing a more efficient solution by allowing instant reporting of compliance rates at various levels (unit hospital state national) based on the moments. 5). In March '11 over three hundred sixty hospitals were using this system to submit their data electronically instead through manual forms. 6）The OLBD allows users not only report but also export these reports into other programs for further analysis and visualization, making it a versatile tool in healthcare compliance tracking. The OLDB allows for instant reporting of HHC rates at a unit, hospital, state and national level, by Moment and HCW. An export capability in the Report function allows users to export into other common programs for table and chart formatting to their preference. Results ======= Development of the OLDB was completed in July 2010.

texts.full_text: f rigidity and to make them hardenable by incorporating functional groups in their structure. Under these conditions, homopolymers containing only C.sub.2 F.sub.4 or C.sub.2 F.sub.3 Cl are totally insoluble in the usual solvents, taking into account their capacity for crytallization. In order to make copolymers of C.sub.2 F.sub.4 or C.sub.2 F.sub.3 Cl soluble it is necessary to incorporate in the composition of the final copolymer a noteworthy amount of nonfluorinated monomer. Good solubility in conventional solvents is necessary for producing paints and varnishes with high dry extract and low viscosity in order to factiliate application. In order to provide these copolymers with this solubility and to make them hardenable, copolymerization is carried out with at least one fluorinated monomer and one ethylenically unsaturated monomer with a functional group, usually selected to be the hydroxy group because it cross-links readily with isocyanates or melamine-formaldehyde Resins. Fluorinated copolymers based on C.sub.2 F.sub.4 or C.sub.2 F.sub.3 Cl which are soluble in conventional solvents and have hydroxy functional groups are described in French Patents 2,488,260 and 2,569,703 as well as in EP 180,962. The copolymers described in French Patent 2,488,260 are a combination of C.sub.2 F.sub.4 and/or C.sub.2 F.sub.3 Cl with hydroxylated vinylic ethers. The level of fluorinated olefins in accordance with the technique described does not exceed 60 mole % and is advantageously about 50 mole %, taking into account the alternation of fluorinated and nonfluorinated structural units. The copolymers described in French patent 2,569,703 are characterized by the combination of C.sub.2 F.sub.3 Cl with a vinylic ester; the functional group is provided by a monohydroxylated allylic derivative. The copolymers described in EP 180,962 are characterized by the combination of any fluoroolefin with a vinylic ester. The functional group is provided by a hydroxylated vinylic ether. texts.full_text: or clearly articulated. They are the product of lived experiences, historical contexts, and ongoing struggles that are deeply embedded in the social fabric. To navigate them, one must be willing to engage deeply and empathetically with the communities in question, often requiring more than just intellectual understanding. It demands a commitment to ongoing learning and a willingness to be corrected and to adapt one's approach. This is where the concept of being an "accomplice" rather than an "ally" becomes particularly relevant. Allies often position themselves as supporters from the outside, offering help or solidarity from a distance. Accomplices, on the other hand, are those who are willing to put themselves on the line, to share in the risks and the struggles, and to work from within the movement or community. This means not only offering support but also being willing to listen, to learn, and to act in ways that are informed by the needs and desires of those communities. The work of being an accomplice is not easy. It requires humility, patience, and a willingness to confront one's own biases and privileges. It also means being prepared to face criticism and to make mistakes, and to learn from those mistakes. But it is through this work that meaningful alliances can be built, and that real progress can be made towards a more just and equitable society. In the end, the key to navigating the complex world of identity politics and building effective alliances is to approach it with a spirit of openness, a commitment to action, and a willingness to be accountable. texts.full_text: iable-pitch stator vane stages being installed between them. Each stator vane stage is thus constituted by a plurality of vanes arranged radially and circumferentially inside the casing that forms a kind of ring, the vanes being stationary in position but variable in orientation. The orientation of all of the vanes must be identical for the entire ring of variable-pitch stator vanes; it is modified as a function of operating conditions. For this purpose, each vane has a control pivot projecting radially outside 10 the casing, the pivots being linked to one another in order to form a chain. The orientation of all of the vanes can thus be controlled by acting on the chain via a conventional actuator device that is connected to the end of the chain. It will be noted that for some turbomachines such as turbojets for airplanes, it is necessary to have access to the interior of the casing in order to maintain or repair certain elements of the compressor. The lender still has to consider your credit worthiness, the value of the property, how much down payment you can afford and all of the other usual considerations. However, in addition, the lender will usually be interested in what the market is for letting properties in the same area as the one that you are thinking of investing in. The lender will look at property taxes and average rents for similar properties. Other than those particulars, however, the process moves along nearly the same. A buy to let mortgage can be arranged for either commercial or residential property. Tyrosinase inhibitory activity-guided fractionation and chemical analysis led to the isolation of two potent compounds, 3,4',5-trihydroxystilbene-4'-O-beta-D-(2"-O-galloyl)glucopyr anoside (1) and 3,4',5-tribenzoic acid ester-stilbenes (6). texts.full_text: he treatment of essential or secondary forms of hypertension, several preclinical chronic studies already provide a picture of what we can expect from these drugs. Endothelin-receptor antagonists are not effective in all experimental models of hypertension, but those that respond present hypertrophy of small arteries, secondary to a local overexpression of type A endothelin receptors (ETA). This suggests that ETA receptor blockade may be particularly beneficial where there is an imbalance between the vasoconstrictive and proliferative actions mediated by this receptor subtype. The role of type B endothelin receptors (ETB) appears to be more complex, as they can mediate both vasodilation when located on vascular smooth muscle cells and clearance of endothelin-1 from circulation. In models where ETA antagonism is effective in reducing blood pressure or reversing arterial remodeling, it often leads to a decrease in systemic resistance and an improvement in cardiac function. However, the clinical utility of these agents might be limited by potential side effects such as fluid retention due to activation of ETB receptors on endothelial cells which can lead to natriuresis inhibition. texts.full_text: each launch is legendary, but leaks and rumors always seem to find their way out before an official announcement. ### What We Know About the iPhone 7 While we're now several years past the release of the iPhone 7 (which came out in September 2016), it's still worth reflecting on what was known leading up to its launch, as this can give us insights into how Apple typically handles new product releases and consumer expectations. #### Key Features Rumored Before Release: - No Headphone Jack: One of the most talked-about changes before the release. It turned out that the iPhone 7 did indeed eliminate the traditional headphone jack in favor of a Lightning connector for audio. - Water Resistance: There were strong hints about water resistance, which was confirmed with an IP67 rating (resistant to dust and can withstand immersion in up to 1 meter of water for 30 - Dual Cameras on iPhone 7 Plus: Rumors suggested that the larger model would feature a dual-camera system. This turned out to be true, Offering optical zoom and better low-light performance. - A10 Fusion Chipset: Speculation about an upgraded processor was accurate; the A10 Fusion chip brought significant improvements in both power efficiency and processing speed. #### What Was Overlooked or Misreported: - Thicker Build for Battery Life: Some rumors suggested a thicker design to accommodate larger batteries, but this didn't materialize. The iPhone 7 maintained its sleek profile while improVing battery life. - Wireless Charging: Despite numerous leaks suggesting wireless charging would be included, it was notably absent from the final product (it later appeared in subsequent models). ### are You Looking For An IT Company To H

texts.full_text: h GCC's ability to decompress debug info sections. This issue might be due to incompatible libraries or an outdated GCC version. Here are a few suggestions to resolve this issue: 1. Use a different GCC version or version-specific libraries: You might be using a GCC version or libraries that are incompatible with 32-bit compilation. Try using a different GCC version that's known to work with 32-bit compilation on your Linux distribution. You can install different GCC versions using `gcc-multilib` or packages on your Linux distribution's repository. For ``` sudo apt install gcc-multilib # For Debian/Ubuntu based systems ``` or ``` sudo apt install gcc-{version}-multilib # For example, gcc-8-multilib ``` Then, use the appropriate gcc command based on the installed version, e.g., `gcc-8 -m32 -o program program.c`. 2. Use the `gcc -no-compress-debug-sections` flag: This flag tells GCC not to compress debug info sections. This might help to resolve the issue. Update your command to include this flag: ``` gcc -no-compress-debug-sections -m32 -o program program.c ``` 3. Check your Linux distribution's repository: Ensure that your Linux distribution's repository has the required 32-bit libraries. Some Linux distributions might remove 32-bit libraries by default. For example, on Debian, you might need to enable the `i386` architecture to install 32-bit libraries: ``` sudo dpk
